checks.name: State Independence
checks.notes: Skill is fully stateless. Context preserved through physical artifacts (PERF_BASELINE.md, BOTTLENECK_REPORT.md, OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md, OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md, PERF_RESULTS.md).

checks.name: Artifact Gating
checks.notes: Every transition requires the preceding artifact. VALIDATE compares against PERF_BASELINE.md.

checks.name: Intent Preservation
checks.notes: Mandatory 'context' in PERF_BASELINE.md and BOTTLENECK_REPORT.md. 'tradeoffs_rejected' in OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md.

checks.name: Loop Breakers
checks.notes: max_retries: 3 in YAML frontmatter. Rollback transition for performance regressions.

checks.name: Physical Execution Standards
checks.notes: VALIDATE uses before/after benchmark comparisons and physical exit codes. No estimated improvements accepted.

checks.name: Single-File Format
checks.notes: YAML frontmatter combined with Markdown body in SKILL.md.

checks.name: Composite Personas
checks.notes: Clearly defined: Profiler (Scout), Detective (Analyze), Optimizer (Strategize), Artisan (Optimize), Benchmarker (Validate), Senior Performance Engineer (Critic).

checks.name: Graceful Degradation
checks.notes: Rollback safety for every optimization. HITL fallback for unresolvable regressions.

checks.name: Separation of Concerns
checks.notes: YAML handles routing logic; Markdown handles cognitive instructions.

checks.name: Agent Agnosticism
checks.notes: No reliance on specific LLM features. Empirical evidence via benchmarks, not estimates.
